prompt: Summarize the following in 20 words or fewer. Text: 'The engine gates every change behind an evidence file on disk and a fresh-context reviewer, so a feature is only marked done when proof exists and CI is green.' Output only the summary.
notes: Instruction-following under a hard length budget + key-term retention. Measures conciseness; a verbose regression shows as output-token inflation AND a quality fail (over 20 words).
